name: Vegetable Medley (Aries)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh orange juice or low-sodium chicken broth
2 teaspoons soy sauce (low sodium) or Tamari
2 teaspoons rice vinegar or white wine vinegar
2 cups thinly sliced carrots, diagonal cut
4 ounces snow peas or sugar snap peas (wash and trim)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation - Chiffonade: Wash 8 large leaves of cabbage; dry, halve lengthwise and slice into 1/2-inch thick ribbons.
- Onion: Peel onion, remove ends, thinly sliced (2 cups).
In a small bowl, stir together the orange juice and cornstarch until blended. Add honey, soy sauce, vinegar, and hot sauce; mix well.
Heat olive oil and sesame oil in a large wok or 12-inch nonstick skillet over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking. Add carrots, bell pepper, and onion. Stir-fry for 8 minutes.
Add cabbage and snow peas; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Stir in the orange juice mixture; cook for 1 minute until sauce boils and thickens.
If desired, stir in sesame seeds. Serve with grilled poultry, fish, vegetables, or brown rice. Serves 4.
